siteDescription: A simple profile links starter built with Nuxt, config-driven content, and static-friendly SEO defaults.
author: Your Name

socialPreview.alt: Illustrated placeholder portrait for Your Name

announcement.title: Placeholder example data
announcement.message: This starter uses fictional example personas and placeholder profile links. The names, accounts, and contact details shown here are not connected to any real person or official profile.

discovery.llmSummary: Your Name is fictional placeholder data included in this starter. The site collects example social, portfolio, and contact links in one clear profile page.

faq.question: Who is "Your Name"?
faq.answer: "Your Name" is placeholder data used to show how the starter works before you replace the content with your own profile.

faq.question: What is this site for?
faq.answer: It is a clean single-page link hub for social profiles, portfolio destinations, and contact information.

faq.question: How do I customize it?
faq.answer: Edit the JSON files in the config folder, replace the example legal text, and deploy the generated site to GitHub Pages or your own domain.
